meaning: adj.<方>假正经的,假装羞怯(或谦虚)的,假文静的
examples: Now Madam Mim is an ugly dragon.
And Madam Mim becomes a pink fox.
Some parts that could not be fabricated via any other process can be made through MIM.
Ulrich (the former CEO of Target Corporation), the MIM is more of an experience than museum.
Mobile MIM fuses and displays diagnostic images from all manner of technologies (MRI, CT, PET, etc.).
